summary_en: Cross Marketing Group completed acquisition of 650,000 shares (¥378.95M) via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026, under board authorization from May 15.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition Results and Completion of Treasury Share Acquisition (ToSTNeT-3 Off-Hours Trading)
translation_en_brief: Cross Marketing Group Inc. (TSE Standard Market, code 3675) announced completion of treasury share acquisition on May 18, 2026. The company acquired 650,000 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥378.95 million via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading mechanism on the Tokyo Stock Exchange), representing approximately 3.36% of issued shares. This acquisition was undertaken to implement flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions and to enhance capital efficiency. The board authorized the buyback on May 15, 2026, with an upper limit of 700,000 shares and ¥408.1 million; the actual execution came in below both limits, and the acquisition program has now concluded.
